name: AnnyAnatomicalAdapter
description: Formal contract and interface specification for integrating the Anny PyTorch parametric body model into the OpenCode dentistry digital twin.

contracts.name: parameterizePatientShape
postconditions: anatomical_mesh_hash is recomputed from shape geometry parameters

contracts.name: animateAnatomicalPose
preconditions: joint_id is a valid body joint identifier
rotation values are in valid float bounds
postconditions: joints_pose maps updated orientation coordinates for joint_id

contracts.name: mapIntraoralTexture
preconditions: uvs elements are valid coordinates arrays
postconditions: textures are scaled and mapped to model mouth cavity bounds
invariants: uv coordinates remain in normalized [0.0, 1.0] range (ANY-I3)

error_catalog.description: Demographic shape parameters violate the biological limits defined by WHO/MakeHuman baselines.
Cranial or mandibular joint rotation exceeded physiological range of motion boundaries.
Mapping coordinate values fall outside of the normalized 2D coordinate box.
